steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to specify when Ur formed. A correct answer must state a precise time tied directly to Ur — not general background about supercontinents, not information about Gondwana, and not a vague reference to the past.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Long ago, the Earth was home to supercontinents like Ur and Gondwana.: "long ago" is vague and gives no specific formation date for Ur. ✗
  • Choice B — The supercontinent Ur formed about 3.1 billion years ago.: names Ur and provides the exact date from the notes — precisely what the question asks for. ✓
  • Choice C — Ur was a supercontinent, a single landmass made up of most or all of Earth's continents.: defines what a supercontinent is but says nothing about when Ur formed. ✗
  • Choice D — Over hundreds of millions of years, the supercontinent cycle results in supercontinents forming and breaking apart.: describes the supercontinent cycle in general; does not specify Ur's formation date. ✗
That is the correct answer.
